message:
test(conformance): extend stdbit fixture coverage to unsigned char + short

Extends the stdbit_ops conformance suite from [ui, ul, ull] to
[uc, us, ui, ul, ull] for all 17 C23 §7.18a operations. Adds 170
new fixture cases (1079 → 1249) covering:

* stdc_leading_zeros / leading_ones / trailing_zeros / trailing_ones
* stdc_first_leading_zero / first_leading_one / first_trailing_zero
  / first_trailing_one
* stdc_count_zeros / count_ones
* stdc_has_single_bit / bit_width / bit_floor / bit_ceil

Test suffix matrix updated in stdbit_ops_conformance_test.rs to
include the two narrower widths. Fixture data added to
tests/conformance/fixtures/stdbit_ops.json.

Regenerated downstream conformance artifacts in tests/conformance/:
* fixture_unit_tests.v1.json — 1079 → 1249 cases
* per_symbol_fixture_tests.v1.json — coverage rebalance
* symbol_fixture_coverage.v1.json — +85 fixture-linked symbols
* support_matrix_maintenance_report.v1.json — fixture coverage
  7.0% → 9.2%
* fixture_pipeline.v1.json, errno_edge_report.v1.json,
  conformance_matrix.v1.json, symbol_latency_baseline.v1.json —
  same regeneration pass.

All 4 stdbit_ops conformance tests pass via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
